author: saml212
name: Varlen Attention + Fused MLP + TTT
blurb: Varlen attention (flash_attn_varlen_func) + fused Triton MLP kernel + LoRA-based test-time training with shared-queue scheduling. Builds on ValCalib_GPTQ_XSA_BigramHash3072 stack. 3-seed exact mean: 1.10915771 BPB / 1.87276644 nats, beating prior record's 1.11473509 BPB / 1.88217853 nats by 0.00941209 nats.
calibration: AR self-generated (64 seqs x 2048 tokens, temp=0.8, no external data)
technique_summary: Varlen attention + fused Triton MLP + LoRA TTT (chunk_size=32, RMSProp) + AR self-gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 + Parallel Muon + LZMA9
